qa_pair.question: Among transporters that ran at least 100 trips, which one has the lowest on-time delivery percentage?
Find the single most anomalous trip by absolute z-score of transit time versus its lane average. What is its trip ID?
Which destination received the highest number of trips in the dataset?
How many unique vehicles did the transporter "CJ DARCL Logistics Limited" use across all its trips?
Looking at the departure rhythm heatmap (weekday by hour of day), which weekday and hour combination has the most departures? Answer as weekday then hour in 24h format.
Excluding a metric's correlation with itself, which pair of numeric metrics has the strongest positive Pearson correlation in the dataset?
What is the median transit time in hours for trips to the destination JAIPUR, rounded to one decimal?
Compare Own fleet versus Market vehicles: how many percentage points higher is the Own fleet's on-time delivery rate, rounded to the nearest whole point?
Which vehicle registration number accumulated the most speed violations in total across all of its trips?
How many trips in the dataset ended with delivery status "Delay Delivery"?
